text.tspan: JUST IN
@unhappychoice releases splashboard v0.4.0, adding 3 new renderers in a single commit!
SOURCES SAY
@unhappychoice pushes 510 commits in 7 days, most of them dependency bumps that keep the ecosystem alive.
UNPRECEDENTED
@unhappychoice merges 4 PRs in one day, including a full architecture rewrite that unlocks future features.
KEYBOARD ON FIRE
@unhappychoice goes on a dependency spree, bumping 18 packages across six repos in a single sprint.
DEVELOPING
@unhappychoice introduces RealtimeFetcher, letting widgets update every frame without disk I/O.
ABOVE AND BEYOND
@unhappychoice releases a new chromeless layout, making dashboards look less boxed and more fluid.
HISTORIC MERGE
@unhappychoice merges a 1658‑line refactor that splits the renderer registry into three axes.

@unhappychoice merges 4 PRs in one day, including a full architecture rewrite that unlocks future features.
KEYBOARD ON FIRE
@unhappychoice goes on a dependency spree, bumping 18 packages across six repos in a single sprint.
DEVELOPING
@unhappychoice introduces RealtimeFetcher, letting widgets update every frame without disk I/O.
ABOVE AND BEYOND
@unhappychoice releases a new chromeless layout, making dashboards look less boxed and more fluid.
HISTORIC MERGE
@unhappychoice merges a 1658‑line refactor that splits the renderer registry into three axes.
JUST IN
@unhappychoice releases splashboard v0.4.0, adding 3 new renderers in a single commit!
